title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Saul, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Robin, Luffy as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Old man Saul! I heard you helped one of our fledglings back in the day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Coming face to face!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I really appreciate it. We're in your debt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Allow me to introduce myself*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who the heck taught you that routine?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nobody.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DERSH SHI SH! I KNOW! The fella's world famous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But hey! Looks like you found them after all...

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just like you said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I actually found them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People willing to accept and protect someone like me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: True friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You know we'd die for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he he! You betcha!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: It's good to meet Robin's friends.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously, you've done great making it all the way to Elbaf!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And sorry for spooking ya earlier!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: me and my assistant, anger, were out here rehearsing that bit for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to be a marine, so I know how impressive it is to be recognized as an emperor!

dialogue.speaker: Saul
dialogue.text: THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR PROTECTING ROBIN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: PLEASE KEEP IT UP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shi Shi sh!!! No problem!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Hey, Saul!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hm? Have we met?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And how the heck are ya Flynn?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm vegapunk!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
